'''Thousand Thousand''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Makem Te/Legends|Makem Te]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Thousand_Thousand.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Thousand Thousand during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]]]
Thousand Thousand was [[Makem Te/Legends|Makem Te's]] most powerful city, with over two million [[Swokes Swokes/Legends|Swokes Swokes]] inhabiting it. Most of the city's buildings were made from [[Iron/Legends|iron]], allowing the city some protection against the frequent wars that took place.

Twelve [[caliph]]s resided in Thousand Thousand, and often accepted gifts from outsiders in exchange for employment.

South of the city was a mining district that contained [[Mining Machine No. 9]].
